title: eleocharis spiralis
intro: Eleocharis spiralis, also known as spiral spike-rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis spiralis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the roots to make a decoction, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for use.
